item.title: Group graduate Zhenyu won the Rising Star Award of ACM SIGBED China
item.description: Dr. Zhenyu Yan won the Rising Star Award of ACM SIGBED China, 2021. (Click for details)

item.title: Dr. Zhenyu Yan and Dr. Chaojie joined the faculty of CUHK and ZJU
item.description: Dr. Zhenyu Yan and Dr. Chaojie joined the faculty of CUHK and ZJU.
